title: audit-context-buildingInput
description: Input schema for Ultra-granular code analysis for deep architectural context building. Line-by-line and block-by-block analysis using First Principles, 5 Whys, 5 Hows methodology at micro scale. Builds mental models, tracks invariants and assumptions, and maps cross-function call flows for security audit preparation.
